title: Linux shell runner
task: Create executable tests/run-tests.sh: set -euo pipefail, cd repo root, exec node --test tests/ (directory path, no glob). Optional tests/run-tests.ps1 for Windows parity.
acceptance: bash tests/run-tests.sh exits 0 on Linux with precedence tests green
Uses node --test tests/ directory invocation per R-0008
Optional run-tests.ps1 invokes same node --test tests/ on Windows
